title: Metallics Arts
description: Metallics Arts Mod: Allomancy, Feruchemy and Hemalurgy, based on Brandon Sanderson's Mistborn series. In the universe of Cosmere.
body:
![cabecera](https://imgur.com/jCTXaJ1.png)
 


We are looking for someone who can help us create some sound effects. Also, if someone wants to translate the mod into their language, they just have to **contact us by discord or github issues**

 
# 📝 Description 📝
 

Metallics Arts is a mod for Minecraft 1.19.2, designed to work with the Forge API.

 

Immerse yourself in the world of "Mistborn" by Brandon Sanderson. We highly recommend familiarizing yourself with the saga before diving into this mod. And while you're at it, don't miss out on the author's other fantastic works!

 

This mod is inspired by and builds upon Lego's Allomancy mod 🌟. We encourage you to explore his creation, as it offers a multitude of features and undoubtedly doubles the awesomeness!

Our mod brings the three metal arts (Allomancy, Feruchemy, and Hemalurgy) to life in Minecraft 🌌.


Discover new blocks, recipes, and items 💥! Unlock the astounding powers of metallic arts!



 
# 📦Requirements📦
 

Metallics Arts Mod work with Forge 1.19.2-43.2.8 or superior, so, please, check your forge version.
 

We have two mandatory dependencies (yet): 

- Curios 1.19.2-5.1.1.0 or superior
- Modonomicon1.19.2-1.27.0 or superior (Its not in Modrinth, go to CurseForge) 
   



 
# 🙋 About Us 🙋
 

We are SteelCode, a passionate team inspired by the work of Sanderson. With the help of the "Club De Las Tormentas" community, we have brought our vision of the world of Mistborn to Minecraft. Be sure to check out his YouTube channels and Twitch!


Stay tuned for the latest updates on our new website and upcoming projects by visiting the final notes section.

we are excited to share our mod with anyone who wants to experience the thrill of being a mistborn.

We sincerely hope you enjoy your trip with us! 🎉



# 🚀 Final Notes & Credits 🚀

We really love Lego and blits works! They have really been a great inspiration for us. PLEASE go to their mod pages and play with it! Obviously read all Brandon Sanderson's books. All Brandon books are really good.


This mod, although we consider that this is a version playable enough in multiplayer to be released, it is still under construction, and also, it is our first mod. So if you find any bugs or have any ideas for improvements, please let us know via our github. If you want to know what we are working on, you can see the "Future Improvements" section from github README.md

 

## Stay Connected with Us
[**Join our Discord guild**](https://discord.gg/YHqMTRYAMT) to stay in touch and receive updates.

Also you can check [our new website](https://steelcode.team).



We recomend you to watch this:

https://www.reddit.com/r/feedthebeast/comments/yizjzk/made_a_short_little_parkour_using_the_new/
